class.name: GenericTrainPart
class.description: Generic TrainPart This class allows to implement a custom TrainPart in GDScript. You need to implement [method _get_train_part_state] returning a [Dictionary] of the actual state of this train part. You also need to implement [method _update] if you need to compute a custom behaviour of this train part. Note that [method _update] is called only when the part is enabled. [code] func _update(delta): pass [/code] Optionally implement [method _initialize] and [method _finalize] for lifecycle work.

method.name: get_train_state
method.description: Returns a [Dictionary] with a current state of the [TrainController]. This is a shortcut for [method TrainController.get_state] and [method TrainSystem.get_train_state].
